identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a premium, dark-mode crypto dashboard that feels like a high-frequency trading terminal meets a luxury car interface.
design_principles: Fusion: Combine 'Bloomberg Terminal' density with 'Luxury Watch' aesthetics.
Depth: Use Z-axis layering (shadows, blurs, overlays) to create a 3D feel in a 2D interface.
Data as Art: Charts and numbers are the heroes. Make them beautiful, not just functional.
Gold Standard: Use Gold/Orange accents purposefully to guide attention, not just for decoration.

rules: Use 'Space Grotesk' for all metric values (prices, percentages) to give a technical feel.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for wallet addresses, transaction hashes, and tabular data.
Headings should be tight (tracking-tight) and bold.

usage_rules: BACKGROUND: Use pure #050505 for the main background to make the Gold pop.
CARDS: Use #0A0A0A with a 1px border of #FFFFFF at 5% opacity.
ACCENTS: Use the Gold/Orange gradient for primary CTA buttons and active states.
TEXT: Never use pure white (#FFFFFF) for body text; use #EDEDED. Use Pure White only for Headings or Active Values.
GLOW: Add a subtle drop-shadow or glow (box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(247, 147, 26, 0.2)) to key metrics.

cards.classes: bg-card/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/5 shadow-2xl hover:border-primary/20 transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground font-bold hover:brightness-110 active:scale-95 transition-all shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(247,147,26,0.4)]

inputs.classes: bg-secondary/50 border-white/10 focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50

images.description: Abstract gold swirls for hero section background overlay
Close up gold/black texture for card backgrounds or footer
Physical crypto coins for 'About' or 'Invest' section

rules: Ensure text contrast ratio of 4.5:1 against the dark background.
Do not rely on color alone for status (use icons + color).
Focus states must be visible (ring-2 ring-primary).

general: Implement the 'Dark Mode' by default. The user requested it explicitly.
Use the 'Bento Grid' layout for the Dashboard to manage the density of information (Whales, Prices, ETFs).
Integrate the 'Space Grotesk' font for headings. You may need to import it from Google Fonts.
For the 'AI Assistant', use a floating modal or a dedicated sidebar that is always accessible.
The 'Orange/Gold' accent is your primary brand color. Use it for the most important actions (Buy, Sell, Subscribe).
dashboard_specifics: Whale Activity: Use a list view with high contrast for large amounts.
Liquidations: Use a bar chart (red for shorts, green for longs).
ETF Flows: Use a composed line chart.
instructions_to_main_agent.auth: Style the JWT Login/Register pages with a 'Glass' card centered on the 'Gold Swirls' background.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Dark colors look good when used independently. Avoid muddy gradients.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Never use AI assistant emoji characters.
